---
title: "IFCD0210 Sprint Backlog"
categories: [ifcd0210, backlog]
toc: true
number-sections: false
format:
  html
filters:
   - lightbox
lightbox: true
---

<style>

.heatMap th { background:  #f4f4f4;}
tr:nth-child(3) {background-color: #f4f4f4;}
tr:nth-child(6) {background-color: #f4f4f4;}
th, td {
  padding: 8px;
  text-align: left;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
}

tr:hover {background-color:  #f4f4f4;}

</style>

![Sprint Backlog](/images/home/backlog.jpg){width="30%"}

<div class="heatMap">

::: {.column-page-right}

##  ``Sprint#21: Polymarket project`` (May 2026)

| # | Day | Date | Topics |  Details Topics |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| **#21** | 70 | 04/05/2026 |  - Plan Sprint#21 </br></br> - **Agile/Scrum**: `What is the impediment?`  </br></br>   - Spring, React, GraphQL Full Stack Project `Polymarket` </br> (1) Understand the needs & features </br> (2) Create roles/teams </br> (3) Create rules/tools </br> (4) **Create sprint plan & Week2**: 2/4 `sprints`  </br> (5) Create requirements docs for `openCode` AI: `tech stack & architecture` </br> (6) Create implementation details    | - [Project: realtime Polymarket](/images/ifcd0210-26/docs/Real-TimePolymarket.md){.external target='_blank'} </br>- [SpreadSheet Polymarket](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1SRePcx1pG46F6KjNXAQ1nztGowOjtxZwa_Vk39gfi-c/edit?usp=sharing){.external target='_blank'} </br> </br> - [Testing appsync bash/py](https://gist.github.com/AlbertProfe/9315a1770fa8115b3180bbd3d5dcb39f){.external target='_blank'}  </br></br> - [Railway: Ship software peacefully](https://railway.com/){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Deploy a Spring Boot App](https://docs.railway.com/guides/spring-boot){.external target='_blank'}|
|  | 71 | 05/05/2026 |   - Spring, React, GraphQL Full Stack Project `Polymarket` </br> (1) Understand the needs & features </br> (2) Create roles/teams </br> (3) Create rules/tools </br> (4) **CD/CI for Back/Front/DB/Documentation**  </br> (5) Create requirements docs for `openCode` AI: `tech stack & architecture` </br> (6) Create implementation details  </br></br> - openCode Ai memory: `Graphify`  |- [openCode AI commit: d2f8d7](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/openCodeAI/tree/d2f8d71ffe968cd608c19a1913b0299e88a5c3c7){.external target='_blank'}</br></br> - [Project: realtime Polymarket](/images/ifcd0210-26/docs/Real-TimePolymarket.md){.external target='_blank'} </br>- [SpreadSheet Polymarket](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1SRePcx1pG46F6KjNXAQ1nztGowOjtxZwa_Vk39gfi-c/edit?usp=sharing){.external target='_blank'} </br> </br> - [graphify repo](https://github.com/safishamsi/graphify){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [graphify](https://graphify.net/){.external target='_blank'} |
|  |
|  | 72 | 06/05/2026 | - openCode AI: **memory:** </br> (1) From Vector Stores to Knowledge Graphs   </br> (2) Building Memory Graphs with LLMs  </br> (3) Graphify Techniques</br> (4) Application of Memory Graphs  </br> </br>  - openCode Ai: MCP testing  </br> (1) react-flight-search </br> (2) MCP Model Context Protocol </br> </br> - openCode `commands`: `opencode serve` & *ngrok*| - [openCode AI commit: 8fe0b44](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/openCodeAI/tree/8fe0b4402ced3cbb5e93b5327e17360ca841b5ac){.external target='_blank'} </br></br>- [graphify](https://graphify.net/){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [graphify repo](https://github.com/safishamsi/graphify){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [Quick Install & Docs](https://graphify.net/index.html){.external target='_blank'} </br></br> - [opencode serve](https://opencode.ai/docs/server/){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [ngrok](https://ngrok.com/){.external target='_blank'}|
|  | 73 | 07/05/2026 | - openCode Ai: MCP testing  </br> (1) **react-flight-search** </br> (2) MCP Model Context Protocol </br> (3) Testing 2 approaches </br> </br> - Pupeteer| - [WebMCP Travel](https://googlechromelabs.github.io/webmcp-tools/demos/react-flightsearch/){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [mcp flight-search: repo](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/openCodeAI/tree/master/docs/mcp/agent-flight-demo-tester){.external target='_blank'} </br> ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AlbertProfe/openCodeAI/refs/heads/master/docs/mcp/agent-flight-demo-tester/outputs/2026-04-19_11-02.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br> - [testing agent](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/openCodeAI/blob/master/docs/mcp/agent-flight-demo-tester/agents/flight-demo-agent.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [testing: 2 approaches](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/openCodeAI/blob/master/docs/mcp/Testing-2-approach.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [puppeteer](https://pptr.dev/){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [puppeteer docs](https://pptr.dev/guides/getting-started){.external target='_blank'}  </br> </br> - [tools: repo](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/openCodeAI/tree/master/docs/tools){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [graphify: repo](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/openCodeAI/tree/master/docs/graphify){.external target='_blank'} </br> |
: Backlog Sprint#21 May 2026 {tbl-colwidths="[2,2,2,55,39]"}
:::

</div>

::: {.callout-note}
- `---------` <s>topic pending</s>
- `-` topic done in class
- `++` new topic not planned
:::
